traceability.md's AC→TEST→Task table assigns each AC-001..AC-019 to exactly one Task-ID with no duplicate primary-test-target assignment (e.g. AC-002/003/004/005/017/018 → T-001 only; AC-006/007/008/009/010/019 → T-002 only). tasks.md Done When lists mirror this 1:1 mapping with no AC repeated across tasks.
dependency-graph.json nodes = [T-001..T-006]. Every Blockers reference in tasks.md (T-001, T-002, T-003, T-004, T-005) resolves to an existing node; no dangling task ID references.

BLOCKERS-FORMAT is PASS, so this check runs. dependency-graph.json edges form a DAG: T-001 (no deps) -> {T-002, T-003} -> T-004 -> T-005 -> T-006. Following edges from any node terminates without revisiting a node; no cycle detected.

No task title or scope connects two distinct feature concerns with 'and'. T-001/T-002/T-003 scopes pair core logic with directly-tied tests (exception 1). T-004 bundles tool registration + contract addition + dist rebuild + tests as one coherent 'wire the tool end-to-end' integration concern (mirrors design.md's single Components grouping, and Rollback states a single revert undoes all of it together). T-005 scope is exclusively tests/golden/ (single concern). T-006 bundles README/USERGUIDE updates with traceability-addendum finalization as mandatory housekeeping tied to WFI-004 post-review artifact freeze (exception 2).

No Done When item uses the forbidden vague verbs/phrases (ensure/consider/update-without-target/verify-is-correct/works-correctly/review-without-outcome/confirm-without-result). Each Done When item names an observable status value tied to an AC (e.g. T-001: 'AC-004: 成果物欠落が missing(throw なし)+ verdict fail に写像される'; T-002: 'AC-008: ...形状 pass + ancestryVerified: false、git プロセスを起動しない'). Every task (including documentation-only T-006, which names exact files README.md/USERGUIDE.md and an addendum artifact) includes at least one item naming a concrete artifact: '実装レポート作成(reports/implementation/evidence-deep-verify-T-NNN.md)' names an exact file in all 6 tasks, and T-001/T-002 additionally require the canonical digest/spec_revision formulas to verbatim-match host scripts (code-inspectable).

traceability.md 'Task → REQ' table lists T-001..T-006, matching all task IDs in tasks.md exactly. All REQ-001..REQ-013 cited in traceability.md exist in requirements.md. All cited anchors correspond to real section headers verified present in the hash-bound layer documents (e.g. security-spec.md has '## Trust Boundaries', '## STRIDE Analysis', '## Secrets Management', '## Security Tests'; infra-spec.md has '## Service Level Objectives'; frontend-spec.md has '## Testing').
